2605.25232.title: Specification-Based Code-Text-Code Reengineering for LLM-Mediated Software Evolution
2605.25232.paper_summary: Direct Code2Code transformation remains challenging to control because it can preserve surface-level syntax while introducing semantic drift, hidden behavioral changes, loss of traceability, non-idiomatic target implementations, or incomplete reconstruction of domain logic. This paper proposes a specification-based Code2Text2Code reengineering framework for LLM-mediated software evolution. The central idea is to transform source code into a neutral textual specification that captures program behavior, identifiers, computational flow, conditions, side effects, data dependencies, and domain-specific intent without directly transferring the source language syntax. The proposed framework combines factual context extraction, Code2Text generation, iterative verification between source code and text specification, Text2Code generation, target code verification, retrieval-augmented grounding, and semantic-aware chunking, and transformation loss estimation. The knowledge representation layer integrates metadata derived from AST, graph-based dependency structures, neutral natural language specifications, technical documentation, business documentation, and architecture-level representations. The conducted experiments include a Code2Text2Code dataset built from multiple programming languages and SQL dialects, comparison of intermediate representations, retrieval evaluation, documentation transformation evaluation, and prompt tuning using DSPy. A graph formalization using structural preservation, reverse compatibility, interface stability, and total graph similarity is implemented to estimate transformation losses. The results support the interpretation of the Code2Text2Code approach not as a simple code transformation, but as a controlled specification-based reengineering process for LLM-mediated software evolution.
2605.25232.paper_summary_zh: 直接的 Code2Code 轉換仍然難以控制，因為它可以保留表面語法，同時引入語義漂移、隱藏的行為變化、可追溯性的喪失、非慣用的目標實現或不完整的領域邏輯重建。本文提出了一個基於規範的 Code2Text2Code 重構框架，用於 LLM 介導的軟體演進。其核心思想是將源代碼轉換為中立的文本規範，該規範捕捉程序行為、標識符、計算流程、條件、副作用、數據依賴性和特定領域的意圖，而不直接轉移源語言語法。所提出的框架結合了事實上下文提取、Code2Text 生成、源代碼與文本規範之間的迭代驗證、Text2Code 生成、目標代碼驗證、增強檢索基礎的基礎和語義感知的分塊，以及轉換損失估計。知識表示層整合了來自 AST 的元數據、基於圖的依賴結構、中立的自然語言規範、技術文檔、業務文檔和架構級表示。進行的實驗包括從多種編程語言和 SQL 方言構建的 Code2Text2Code 數據集、中間表示的比較、檢索評估、文檔轉換評估，以及使用 DSPy 的提示調整。實施了一種使用結構保留、反向兼容性、介面穩定性和總圖相似性來估計轉換損失的圖形形式化。結果支持將 Code2Text2Code 方法解釋為一個受控的基於規範的重構過程，而非簡單的代碼轉換，適用於 LLM 介導的軟體演進。
2605.25232.author: Oleg Grynets et.al.
2605.25232.authors: Oleg Grynets, Vasyl Lyashkevych, Arsen Dolichnyi, Roman Piznak, Taras Zelenyy, Volodymyr Morozov
